_note: Sponsor tiers + current sponsors — the single source for the README section, the Community page sponsor wall, and SPONSORS.md. Add a sponsor by appending to "sponsors" (name, url, logo, tier). Run: node scripts/build-community.mjs to refresh the wall.

tiers.name: 🏢 Sustaining
perks: Your logo + link in the README and on the site
One custom skill built for you each quarter

tiers.name: 💎 Partner
perks: Your logo on every skill page
A private skill pack built for your team
Priority support & a quarterly review call
